title: Tabby: a cat that lives in your browser
description: A free Chrome extension. Pet her, feed her, and watch her grow from kitten to adult. Private, local, and free.
ogImageAlt: Tabby, an orange cat that lives in your browser

privacy.title: Privacy Policy for Tabby
privacy.description: How Tabby handles your data. Local only, no accounts, no cloud. Active tab title and URL only.

terms.title: Terms of Service for Tabby
terms.description: Terms for using the Tabby Chrome extension. Free software from Yanovian LLC.
